records.question: Which addresses at 771 Yaound Manor have the postal code 86768?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT address.address_id FROM address
JOIN city ON address.city_id = city.city_id
JOIN country ON city.country_id = country.country_id
WHERE address.postal_code = '86768' AND address.address = '771 Yaound Manor'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT address.address_id
FROM address
WHERE address = '771 Yaound Manor' AND postal_code = '86768'

records.question: Which addresses at 1404 Taguig Drive in Okayama with postal code 87212 have been updated since 2006-02-15 04:45:30, belong to active customers with last name ISBELL and email FREDERICK.ISBELL@sakilacustomer.org, and are in cities that were last updated on 2006-02-15 04:45:25?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT address.address_id FROM address
JOIN city ON address.city_id = city.city_id
JOIN customer ON address.address_id = customer.address_id
WHERE customer.active = 1 AND customer.email = 'FREDERICK.ISBELL@sakilacustomer.org' AND city.last_update = '2006-02-15 04:45:25' AND customer.last_name = 'ISBELL' AND address.postal_code = '87212' AND address.address = '1404 Taguig Drive' AND address.last_update >= '2006-02-15 04:45:30' AND address.district = 'Okayama'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.address_id
FROM address a
JOIN customer c ON a.address_id = c.address_id
JOIN city ci ON a.city_id = ci.city_id
WHERE a.address = '1404 Taguig Drive'
  AND ci.city = 'Okayama'
  AND a.postal_code = '87212'
  AND a.last_update > '2006-02-15 04:45:30'
  AND c.active = TRUE
  AND c.last_name = 'ISBELL'
  AND c.email = 'FREDERICK.ISBELL@sakilacustomer.org'
  AND ci.last_update = '2006-02-15 04:45:25'

records.question: Which addresses exactly at 1789 Saint-Denis Parkway with phone 936806643983 and postal code 8268 are in the Coahuila de Zaragoza district, updated on or after 2006-02-15 04:45:30, and located in the city of Acua that was updated at most 2006-02-15 04:45:25?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT address.address_id FROM address
JOIN city ON address.city_id = city.city_id
WHERE address.last_update >= '2006-02-15 04:45:30' AND address.address = '1789 Saint-Denis Parkway' AND address.phone = '936806643983' AND address.postal_code = '8268' AND city.city = 'Acua' AND city.last_update <= '2006-02-15 04:45:25' AND address.district = 'Coahuila de Zaragoza'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a.address_id
FROM address a
JOIN city c ON a.city_id = c.city_id
WHERE a.address = '1789 Saint-Denis Parkway'
  AND a.phone = '936806643983'
  AND a.postal_code = '8268'
  AND a.district = 'Coahuila de Zaragoza'
  AND a.last_update >= '2006-02-15 04:45:30'
  AND c.city = 'Acua'
  AND c.last_update <= '2006-02-15 04:45:25'

records.question: Can you find the addresses in Gauteng with postal code 9668 and phone number 248446668735 for customers with last name SAUER, where the city was last updated on or after 2006-02-15 04:45:25?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT address.address_id FROM address
JOIN city ON address.city_id = city.city_id
JOIN customer ON address.address_id = customer.address_id
WHERE customer.last_name = 'SAUER' AND address.postal_code = '9668' AND city.last_update >= '2006-02-15 04:45:25' AND address.district = 'Gauteng' AND address.phone = '248446668735'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.address_id
FROM address a
JOIN city c ON a.city_id = c.city_id
JOIN customer cu ON a.address_id = cu.address_id
WHERE c.district = 'Gauteng'
AND a.postal_code = '9668'
AND a.phone = '248446668735'
AND cu.last_name = 'SAUER'
AND c.last_update >= '2006-02-15 04:45:25'

records.question: Where is the address at 1923 Stara Zagora Lane in the Nantou district with postal code 95179, located in Taiwan, where the country was last updated on 2006-02-15 04:44:00 and the city was last updated on or after 2006-02-15 04:45:25?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT address.address_id FROM address
JOIN city ON address.city_id = city.city_id
JOIN country ON city.country_id = country.country_id
WHERE address.postal_code = '95179' AND country.last_update = '2006-02-15 04:44:00' AND country.country = 'Taiwan' AND city.last_update >= '2006-02-15 04:45:25' AND address.address = '1923 Stara Zagora Lane' AND address.district = 'Nantou'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT address.address_id
FROM address
JOIN city ON address.city_id = city.city_id
JOIN country ON city.country_id = country.country_id
WHERE address.address = '1923 Stara Zagora Lane'
  AND address.district = 'Nantou'
  AND address.postal_code = '95179'
  AND country.country = 'Taiwan'
  AND country.last_update = '2006-02-15 04:44:00'
  AND city.last_update >= '2006-02-15 04:45:25'
